channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Gaetz to introduce bill cutting off federal aid to groups helping illegal immigrants enter US
item.description: Rep. Matt Gaetz, R-Fla., is expected to introduce a bill Thursday that would cut off federal assistance to any organization giving aid to illegal immigrants crossing into the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Top 6 major moments from the Valadao, Salas debate
item.description: BAKERSFIELD, Calif. (KGPE) - For those who might have missed it, here are the top six notable questions and answers from Wednesday's debate between David Valadao and Rudy Salas. Both candidates are competing to represent the Central Valley in California's 22nd Congressional District.
item.dc:creator: Dom McAndrew, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How Black leaders in New York are grappling with Eric Adams and representation
item.description: The indictment of New York City mayor Eric Adams on federal bribery charges has sparked debates among Black leaders and community advocates about whether to stand behind a figure who, for many, represents a milestone of Black representation in government.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Morrison And Matt Brown, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: How Trump credits an immigration chart for saving his life — and what the chart is missing
item.description: Ever since the assassination attempt at his rally in Pennsylvania, Donald Trump has professed a unique fondness for a bar chart he credits for saving his life. Trump was addressing the crowd in Butler about illegal immigration and reviewing a chart that detailed U.S.
item.dc:creator: ADRIANA GOMEZ LICON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Haunted by 2016, some Michigan Democrats worry that Harris remains ill-defined in swing state
item.description: Some Michigan Democrats are raising concerns about Vice President Kamala Harris’ presidential bid in a crucial swing state.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Beaumont And Joey Cappelletti, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Braun, McCormick trade attacks, discuss issues during first Indiana governor debate
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS -- While there were many issues discussed during the first debate between Indiana's top two gubernatorial records, much of the debate served as attacks on each other's records, as well as their respective running mates. On Wednesday evening, U.S. Senator Mike Braun, R-Ind.
item.dc:creator: David Gay, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Kaine and Cao face off in only debate of campaign for US Senate seat from Virginia
item.description: U.S. Sen. Tim Kaine of Virginia and Republican challenger Hung Cao have gone toe to toe in their only debate of the campaign over issues from illegal immigration to tariffs on foreign goods.
item.dc:creator: Ben Finley, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Are Nevada voters swayed by promises of 'no tax on tips'?
item.description: Reporter John Langeler from KLAS in Las Vegas joins "The Hill" to discuss whether Nevada voters are swayed by proposals to eliminate federal taxes on tips.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation

item.title: Trump blasts DOJ for 'election interference,' calls Jack Smith case a 'scam' after judge unseals key filing
item.description: Former President Trump blasted the DOJ for having “disobeyed their own rule in favor of complete and total election interference" after a key filing from Special Counsel Jack Smith’s election case against him was unsealed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Marquette poll has Harris over Trump in Wisconsin, but within margin of error
item.description: Marquette University professor Charles Franklin joined the WGN Evening News on Wednesday to break down the latest numbers from the law school's poll about the upcoming presidential election.
item.dc:creator: Ray Cortopassi, WGN 9

item.title: Watch: FOX59/CBS4 Indiana Governor Debate
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS -- For the first time this election year, the two major party candidates are having the opportunity to participate in a televised debate surrounding issues that are important for Indiana voters. U.S. Senator Mike Braun, R-Ind.
item.dc:creator: David Gay, NewsNation

item.title: Walz explains 'friends with shooters' gaffe from the VP debate with Vance
item.description: Sen. JD Vance, R-Ohio, and Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz on Wednesday traded barbs over Tuesday night's vice presidential debate during campaign stops in Pennsylvania and Michigan.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Cybersecurity head says there's no chance a foreign adversary can change US election results
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Nearly a month out from Election Day, the head of the nation’s cybersecurity agency is forcefully reassuring Americans who have been swept into the chaotic churn of election disinformation and distrust that they will be able to feel confident in the outcome.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTINA A. CASSIDY and ALI SWENSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden won't support a strike on Iran nuclear sites as Israel weighs response to Iran missile attack
item.description: JOINT BASE ANDREWS, Md. (AP) — President Joe Biden said Wednesday he will not support an Israeli strike on sites related to Tehran’s nuclear program in response to Iran's missile attack on Israel.
item.dc:creator: COLLEEN LONG and AAMER MADHANI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: JD Vance again refuses to say Donald Trump lost the 2020 presidential election
item.description: AUBURN HILLS, Mich. (AP) — Republican vice presidential candidate JD Vance on Wednesday again refused to say who he believed won the 2020 presidential election, which has been the persistent focus of false claims by his running mate, Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Democrats see signs of growing momentum in Texas Senate race
item.description: Democrats are seeing signs of growing momentum in the Texas Senate race between Sen. Ted Cruz (R) and Rep. Colin Allred (D), fueling the party’s hopes that this year could be the breakthrough they’ve been seeking for multiple cycles.
item.dc:creator: Julia Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Judge unseals new Trump Jan. 6 election interference evidence
item.description: Prosecutors provided the most detailed look yet at their election interference case against former President Donald Trump.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Johnson and Ryan Lucas, MPR News

item.title: Judge unseals key filing in special counsel's election case against Trump
item.description: U.S. District Judge for the District of Columbia Tanya Chutkan on Wednesday unsealed a key filing in Special Counsel Jack Smith’s election case against former President Trump.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump ups his ante with September fundraising haul
item.description: Former President Trump rakes in over $160 million in fundraising in September, up from his August haul, as he tries to catch up to Vice President Kamala Harris in the 2024 election cash dash.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Harris and Trump are tested by the Mideast, Helene and the port strike in the campaign's final weeks
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A trio of new trials — a devastating hurricane, expanding conflict in the Mideast and a dockworkers strike that threatens the U.S.
item.dc:creator: AAMER MADHANI, ZEKE MILLER and THOMAS BEAUMONT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: WATCH: 22nd Congressional District Debate with David Valadao and Rudy Salas
item.description: The two candidates seeking election to California's 22nd Congressional District will face off tonight.
item.dc:creator: Jose Franco, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Minnesota abortion law signed by Walz scrutinized during VP debate
item.description: Internet searches about Minnesota’s abortion law — the first state to codify access after the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade — were high during Tuesday night’s vice presidential debate.
item.dc:creator: Cathy Wurzer and Gracie Stockton, MPR News

item.title: Bipartisan California lawmakers urge House leaders to boost disaster relief funding
item.description: A bipartisan group of lawmakers from Orange County, Calif., are urging House leaders to include disaster relief funding in fiscal 2025 spending, highlighting wildfire damage in the state even as damage from Hurricane Helene on the other side of the country has heightened attention on the issue.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Harris backs striking port workers, knocks Trump
item.description: Vice President Kamala Harris voiced her support Wednesday for striking port workers while bashing her rival former President Donald Trump after tens of thousands of longshoremen at ports along the East Coast and Gulf of Mexico walked off the job.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Vance oozed confidence compared to jittery Walz, body language expert says: 'Captain of the ship'
item.description: Sen. JD Vance, R-Ohio, and Democratic Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz's body language sharply contrasted with one another at Tuesday's vice presidential debate, a body language expert says.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tim Walz says 'most of us want to solve' migrant crisis: voters react
item.description: Gov. Tim Walz received steady support from independent and Democratic debate watchers during his remarks on immigration, except when he bashed former President Trump on the issue.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The Latest: Trio of crises looms over the campaign's final stretch
item.description: In a debate that evoked a calmer era in American politics, Tim Walz and JD Vance went after each other’s running mates Tuesday and sought to shore up their campaigns’ vulnerabilities at a time of renewed fears of a regional war in the Middle East and sadness over devastation from Hurricane Helene.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Vance and Walz keep it civil in a policy-heavy discussion: VP debate takeaways
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Vice presidential hopefuls Tim Walz and JD Vance focused their criticism on the top of the ticket on Tuesday as they engaged in a policy-heavy discussion that may be the last debate of the 2024 presidential campaign.
item.dc:creator: BILL BARROW, ZEKE MILLER and NICHOLAS RICCARDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Walz’s account of son’s brush with gun violence offers poignant moment in VP debate
item.description: “Look, I’ve got a 17-year-old and he witnessed a shooting at a community center playing volleyball,” Walz said during the debate, referencing his son Gus. “Those things don’t leave you.
item.dc:creator: Sam Stroozas, MPR News

item.title: Trump downplays troop injuries in 2020 missile strike: 'You mean because they had a headache?'
item.description: "So first of all, injured. What does injured mean? Injured means — you mean because they had a headache? Because the bombs never hit the fort," Trump said.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, NewsNation

item.title: Trump won't participate in interview for '60 Minutes' election special
item.description: Trump's campaign spokesman said, “Fake news," adding that there were discussions but nothing was ever locked in.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BAUDER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: NY race for US Senate: Gillibrand talks Adams indictment, term limits, economy
item.description: Come Nov. 5, the 15-year Democratic senator will defend her seat against Republican challenger Mike Sapraicone.
item.dc:creator: Emily Rahhal, NewsNation

item.title: Cook Political Report shifts Texas Senate race toward Democrats
item.description: The Cook Political Report on Tuesday shifted Texas’s Senate race from "likely Republican" to "lean Republican," signaling momentum for Rep. Colin Allred's (D) challenge against incumbent Sen. Ted Cruz (R) in the red state.
item.dc:creator: Julia Manchester, NewsNation

item.title: Habitat for Humanity volunteers continue Carter’s legacy on 100th birthday
item.description: For 40 years, the project has brought together volunteers, celebrities and elected officials to build homes and highlight the need for affordable housing.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Thamer, MPR News

item.title: Harris will tour Helene devastation in Georgia, North Carolina as storm scrambles campaign schedule
item.description: The Democratic nominee plans to visit Georgia on Wednesday and survey the devastation in North Carolina in the coming days, according to aides.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER and CHRIS MEGERIAN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Israel begins ground offensive in Lebanon
item.description: The Israeli military pressed its ground incursion into southern Lebanon on Tuesday, calling the operations “limited incursions” that are targeting Hezbollah militants.
item.dc:creator: Daniel Estrin, Kat Lonsdorf, and Miguel Macias, MPR News

item.title: As debate rages over coverage, rural Minnesotans face challenges getting fertility care
item.description: For many rural Minnesotans getting treatments is still really hard and expensive. The stark reality is 1 in 6 in the state are currently experiencing infertility, and for those living outside the metro, treatment options are especially limited.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Yang, MPR News
